'''Wip Sheff''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Republic Correctional Authority/Legends|Correctional Authority]] guard wanted by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] Clan for skimming profits from an inside [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operation. He was described as a crooked [[Prison/Legends|prison]] guard. Sometime after the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|battle]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] claimed the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on Wip Sheff when he broke into [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]] to capture [[Bendix Fust]].

==Behind the scenes==
This bounty is worth 4,000 [[Death/Legends|dead]] or alive. It is up to the player's decision on which way to take him.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
